arts.ttl: Spurs fans protest against owners & chairman Levy
arts.sum: Hundreds of Tottenham fans take part in a protest showing their anger at the club's board and owners and calling for chairman Daniel Levy "to get out of our club".

Pedro Porro returns to the starting line-up in place of Destiny Udogie, with Djed Spence moving across to left-back. Ben Davies also returns to the starting XI with Micky van de Ven taking a place amongst our substitutes.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Southampton predicted to see if Spurs could avoid unwanted five-game streak
arts.sum: Tottenham face arguably their easiest game of the Premier League season on paper today, with Spurs welcoming Southampton to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. We predict that Spurs could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Davies, Udogie; Bentancur, Sarr, Bergvall; Johnson, Solanke, Tel.

arts.ttl: “Someone put pressure” – Conspiracy claim about Fabio Paratici’s future after Tottenham
arts.sum: Former Tottenham sporting director Fabio Paratici was linked with a move to AC Milan in the last few weeks.
